steps.title: Identify the personification
steps.content: The key signal is the metaphor of “welcoming arms” — the trees are personified as actively extending arms to greet Shakti, establishing that the landscape recognizes her return.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The personification establishes that Shakti feels she genuinely belongs in this landscape — the place itself seems to recognize and welcome her.

The other choices either contradict this sense of welcome, invent confusion that doesn't exist, or redirect focus from her connection to the place.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
